notes: Batch 18 is a uniformly high-quality set of 257 single/dual cloze cards (all AACloze from one source deck, MrPankow P/S Deck 7A); cloze {{c1}}/{{c2}} braces are well-formed and balanced (including the ::hint syntax that renders as [Theory], [Dude], [hormone], etc.), HTML tags (font/b/i/u/div/img/br) are balanced even in the multi-deletion id/ego/superego and defense-mechanism notes, and no LaTeX/MathJax delimiters are used (figures live as images in the Extra field). Q/A correspondence is correct throughout both ords with no empty answers, no answer==question, no unrendered template artifacts, and no image-only cards. The only flags are 4 info-level cosmetic artifacts where mnemonics bold individual leading letters (OCEAN and 'AM I Motivated'), splitting words in the rendered answer; unrelated source spelling typos (e.g., 'reservour', 'plateu', 'immitation', 'fullfilment') and crude/informal notes exist but fall outside the three structural checks and do not break studying, so they were not flagged.
